analysis.consistency: High. The feature aligns perfectly with standard D&D 5e progression, as the 20th level capstone ability for a core class.

mechanics.balance_notes: This is a powerful capstone, offering significant boosts to two primary stats, which is typical for a 20th-level class feature.
